name: Motorola Solutions, Inc.
business: Motorola Solutions is a global leader in mission-critical safety and security technologies for public safety, government, including defense, and enterprise customers. The company's ecosystem includes Mission Critical Networks (MCN), Video Security and Access Control (Video), and Command Center software and services. It operates through two segments: Products and Systems Integration (62% of 2025 net sales) and Software and Services (38% of 2025 net sales).

exposures.sentence: Our video software integrates AI-powered analytics to deliver operational insights to our customers by bringing attention to important events within their video footage.

Across all three technologies, we offer artificial intelligence ("AI")-powered capabilities and software solutions, services such as cybersecurity subscription services and managed and support services.
We support public safety and defense agencies in their mission to protect communities and countries.

MCN: Infrastructure, mobile ad-hoc network ("MANET") technology, devices (two-way radio and broadband, including both for public safety and professional and commercial radio ("PCR")), software and AI-powered capabilities.

Video: Cameras (fixed, body-worn, in-vehicle), access control, sensors, infrastructure, video management, video monitoring, software and AI-powered analytics that enable visibility of events and focus attention on what's important, to inform faster and more accurate decisions and actions.
In addition, rare earth minerals and other commodities are used in our manufacturing operations.

catalysts.sentence: Approximately $4.8 billion of backlog is expected to be recognized as revenue during 2026.
